description: Paul joined Sellafield in 1979 and has held a wide variety of leadership roles, including the commissioning of the waste vitrification lines and operations within existing nuclear facilities. His most recent role was head of the Site Ion Exchange Effluent Plant (SIXEP) programme where he established a clear strategy and business case to support future operations. In addition to leadership roles, he has been a member of the Nuclear Safety Committee since 2015.

details.body:
Paul joined Sellafield in 1979 and has held a wide variety of leadership roles, including the commissioning of the waste vitrification lines and operations within existing nuclear facilities.

His most recent role was head of the Site Ion Exchange Effluent Plant (SIXEP) programme where he established a clear strategy and business case to support future operations.

In addition to leadership roles, he has been a member of the Nuclear Safety Committee since 2015.

Paul joined Sellafield in 1979 and has held a wide variety of leadership roles, including the commissioning of the waste vitrification lines and operations within existing nuclear facilities.

His most recent role was head of the Site Ion Exchange Effluent Plant (SIXEP) programme where he established a clear strategy and business case to support future operations.

In addition to leadership roles, he has been a member of the Nuclear Safety Committee since 2015.

The Chief Nuclear Officer is accountable for ensuring that decisions taken in the leadership of Sellafield do not adversely impact nuclear safety and security, and that these remain the overriding priority for our business.

role_appointments.title: Paul Robson - Interim Chief Nuclear Officer

title: Paul Robson
